win_condition: After all players have passed in autumn, highest total points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most events wins; if still tied, tied player with most resources wins.

categories.label: Cards in City
categories.description: Total printed points on cards in each player city.

categories.label: Events
categories.description: Points from basic and special events claimed.

categories.label: Prosperity Cards
categories.description: Endgame points from purple prosperity cards.

categories.label: Journey and Tokens
categories.description: Journey points and any point tokens/bonuses from effects.
